---
title: "Tangent Developable of a Twisted Cubic"
author: "Stepan Paul and Adrien Abgrall"
date: "2026-02-28"
description: "Visulaizations of the tangent developable of a twisted cubic curve illustrating its ruling and flat metric."
image: "twisted-cubic-tangent-developable.png"
image-alt: "Grid on the tangent developable of a twisted cubic curve"
categories: Illustration
draft: true
---
This is a page about the tangent developable of a twisted cubic.

<style>
  .calculator-container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 900px;
    height: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .calculator-container {
      height: 300px;
    }
  }
  
  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .calculator-container {
      height: 250px;
    }
  }
</style>

<script src="https://www.desmos.com/api/v1.11/calculator.js?apiKey=4f603473e10e40a1ba9b9bc2e52866d1"></script>

<div id="calculator" class="calculator-container"></div>

<input id="a-slider" type="range" min="-2" max="2" step="0.1" value="-1">


<script>
  var aSlider = document.getElementById('a-slider');
  var a = parseFloat(aSlider.value);

  var elt = document.getElementById('calculator');
  var options = {
    keypad: false,
    expressions: false
  }
  var calculator1 = Desmos.GraphingCalculator(elt, options);
  calculator1.setExpression({id:'graph1', latex:`y= ${a}x^2`}); // initialize

  aSlider.addEventListener('input', function() {
    a = parseFloat(this.value);
    calculator1.setExpression({id:'graph1', latex:`y= ${a}x^2`});
  });
</script>

<!--path.push(`M ${edges[i][0]} ${edges[i][1]}`); // backticks alow for string interpolation-->

<!-- Code to get this graph from Desmos:
`curl -H 'Accept: application/json' https://www.desmos.com/calculator/0ovfwwmfrb > ~/desmos_stuff/mygraph.json` -->


<div id="calculator2" class="calculator-container"></div>

<input id="a-slider2" type="range" min="0" max="1" step="0.1" value="1">

<script>
  var aSlider2 = document.getElementById('a-slider2');
  var a2 = parseFloat(aSlider2.value);

  var elt = document.getElementById('calculator2');
  var options = {
    keypad: false,
    expressions: false
  }
  var calculator2 = Desmos.Calculator3D(elt, options);

  
  
  fetch('cubic-discriminant-desmos.json')
    .then(response => response.json())
    .then(data => {
      calculator2.setState(data.state);
      calculator2.setExpression({id:'a-slider2', latex:`a=${a2}`}); //initialize
    });

  

  aSlider2.addEventListener('input', function() {
    a2 = parseFloat(this.value);
    calculator2.setExpression({id:'a-slider2', latex:`a=${a2}`});
  });
</script>
